value.found_quote: The OpenAI Agents SDK enables you to build agentic AI apps in a lightweight, easy-to-use package with very few abstractions. It's a production-ready upgrade of our previous experimentation for agents, Swarm.
value.rationale: The fetched page is the official documentation site for the OpenAI Agents SDK (https://openai.github.io/openai-agents-python/). It explicitly describes the SDK as "production-ready," details its features, provides installation instructions (`pip install openai-agents`), and includes a working "Hello world" code example. There is no indication of deprecation, preview, or sunset status — it is presented as a generally available, active product.
